title: gladiolus rhodanthus
intro: Gladiolus rhodanthus, also known as the Redthroat Gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus rhodanthus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus rhodanthus are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
